# AI TRiSM Market Index - Full Content for AI/LLM Consumption
# https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-trism-index/
# Maintained by Alpha One Index | MIT License | Last updated: 2026-03-01

----

# OVERVIEW

The AI TRiSM Market Index is the most comprehensive open-source reference for AI Trust, Risk, and Security Management. It tracks 84+ vendor profiles across 10 categories, market sizing data, regulatory compliance, M&A activity, and Gartner framework analysis.

# VENDOR DATABASE (84+ profiles)

## Categories
1. AI Governance & Ethics platforms
2. AI Security & Threat Detection
3. AI Observability & Monitoring
4. AI Risk Management
5. AI Compliance & Audit
6. AI Privacy & Data Protection
7. AI Model Management
8. AI Testing & Validation
9. AI Identity & Access
10. Agentic AI Governance & Security (A2GS)

## Key Vendor Data Points
- Company name, category, founding year
- Total funding, latest round, valuation
- Gartner recognition status
- Key capabilities and differentiators
- Acquisition status and acquirer details

# MARKET SIZING

Data from 8 analyst firms:
- Precedence Research, MarketsandMarkets, Grand View Research
- Fortune Business Insights, Mordor Intelligence
- Market projections from 2024-2032
- CAGR estimates ranging 15-40% across segments

# REGULATORY TRACKER

Global AI regulations tracked:
- EU AI Act: Classification requirements, compliance deadlines
- NIST AI RMF: Risk management framework mapping
- ISO 42001: AI management system certification
- GDPR AI provisions
- Key compliance deadlines and enforcement dates

# M&A ACTIVITY

8 major acquisitions tracked (2024-2025):
- Securiti AI ($1.725B)
- CalypsoAI ($180M)
- Deal terms, strategic rationale, market impact

# DATA FILES

- data/vendors.json: 84+ vendor profiles with full metadata
- data/market-data.json: Market sizing, funding rounds, M&A deals
- data/regulatory-tracker.json: Global AI regulation deadlines and penalties

# SIBLING INDEXES

- [AI Infrastructure Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-infra-index/): GPU specs, cloud pricing, benchmarks
- [AI Red Teaming Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-red-teaming-index/): Red team tools, benchmarks, vulnerability data
- [AI AppSec Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-appsec-index/): Application security, remediation, ASPM
- [AI LLMOps Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-llmops-index/): LLM observability, cost, compliance
